_description: Gold standard expected output for: Legal Case and Document Management System — District of Columbia Courts (DCSC-26-RFP-60)

expected.title: Legal Case and Document Management System
expected.office: Administrative Services Division, Procurement and Contracts Branch
expected.summary: The District of Columbia Courts (D.C. Courts) Office of the General Counsel (OGC) is procuring a cloud-hosted, configurable COTS Legal Case and Document Management System. The contractor must provide software licenses, installation, document migration of approximately 1.2 TB and 390,000 files, implementation, on-site post-implementation support and end-user training, and ongoing maintenance. The system must support AI-driven workflow automation, eDiscovery, generative AI, FedRAMP-authorized hosting, NIST 800-53 r5 compliance, Section 508 accessibility, and Microsoft Entra ID-based MFA/SSO.

_field_sources.title: Cover page: 'Legal Case and Document Management System'
_field_sources.office: Cover page: 'Administrative Services Division, Procurement and Contracts Branch' (issuing office)
